ibanHint: IBAN must start with SA and contain 22 digits total
profileWeakPassword: Password must be 8-32 chars with uppercase, lowercase, number, and symbol
cancelAuctionConfirm: Are you sure you want to cancel this auction?
markAsSoldConfirm: Are you sure you want to mark this auction as sold?
featureEndDateFuture: Featured end date must be in the future
featureEndAfterAuctionEnd: Featured end date cannot exceed the auction end date
featureOnlyLiveAuction: Only live auctions can be featured
auctionHouseDescription: Create your auction house to start listing items for sale
auctionHouseDescriptionPlaceholder: Tell us about your auction house...
sizeBetween3And255: Size must be between 3 and 255 characters

admin.title: Admin Dashboard
admin.subtitle: Monitor platform activity, review users, inspect listings, and keep marketplace operations under control.
admin.previewMode: Preview mode is enabled. Admin access is being bypassed on the frontend for testing, and users data may be mocked if the backend denies access.

users.title: Users Management
users.description: Browse registered accounts, inspect their details, and prepare moderation actions.
users.searchPlaceholder: Search by id, username, email, or role
users.detailsDescription: Review available account information returned by the platform.
users.detailsUnavailable: No user details are currently available.
users.emptyDescription: No user records were returned from the backend.
users.emptySearchDescription: Try a different keyword or role filter.

auctions.title: Auctions Monitoring
auctions.description: Review all platform listings, inspect details, and prepare moderation actions.
auctions.searchPlaceholder: Search by id, title, seller, or auction house
auctions.detailsDescription: Review the complete auction payload currently available to the frontend.
auctions.detailsUnavailable: No auction details are currently available.
auctions.noImages: No images are attached to this listing.
auctions.noDescription: No description was provided for this listing.
auctions.emptyDescription: No auction records were returned from the backend.
auctions.emptySearchDescription: Try a different keyword or status filter.

confirm.userDeleteDescription: Are you sure you want to permanently delete {{username}}? All related bids, ratings, and data will be removed.
confirm.auctionDeleteDescription: Are you sure you want to permanently delete "{{title}}"? All bids and associated data will be removed.
confirm.lastAdminWarning: This user is the sole admin of their auction house. Deleting them will also permanently delete the auction house and all its auctions.

integration.userDetails: Detailed user profile data is waiting for backend integration. The dialog is showing the currently available list data.
integration.userDelete: User deletion is waiting for backend integration.
integration.auctionDelete: Auction deletion is waiting for backend integration.

autoBid.title: Auto-Bid
autoBid.description: The system will automatically bid on your behalf up to the specified maximum amount
autoBid.errorMinAmount: Amount must be greater than current highest bid
autoBid.errorGeneric: An error occurred, please try again
